title: Azure Blueprints retirement - Azure Blueprints
display_title: Plan migration off Azure Blueprints with timelines
description: Learn when Azure Blueprints is retired, the phased retirement timeline, what changes in each phase, and how to migrate to Azure Deployment Stacks and template specs.
summary:
Azure Blueprints (Preview) is being retired. The retirement was originally announced on
September 14, 2023 with a retirement date of July 11, 2026. That timeline has been extended toJanuary 31, 2027, with aphased retirement beginning July 31, 2026. This article explains the phased timeline, what changes at each phase, and how to migrate. For
answers to common questions, see theAzure Blueprints retirement FAQ.
classification_reason: Retirement article includes specific retirement dates, phased timeline milestones, and migration guidance to Deployment Stacks and template specs, which are concrete decision inputs for when and how to move off the service.
